description_long: This is a small, rectangular pink juice carton with a pixel art aesthetic, featuring a red screw cap on the top corner. The front panel displays Japanese katakana and hiragana text in green and white, framed by a pastel pink background. Both side panels are decorated with pixelated cherry illustrations, one of which also includes a barcode. The top surface shows another cherry graphic, while the back panel contains a nutritional information table and a small flower icon. The carton is made of laminated paperboard, typical for juice packaging, and is lightweight and portable. The overall design is playful and visually appealing, suitable for urban vending machines or convenience stores.
description: A pink, pixel-art style juice carton with a red screw cap, cherry illustrations, and Japanese text on the front.
description_view_0: Side view showing a pixelated cherry illustration and pink stripes.
description_view_1: Front view with Japanese text in green and white on a pink background, and the red screw cap visible on top.
description_view_2: Opposite side view with a cherry illustration and a barcode.
description_view_3: Back view featuring a nutritional information panel, a cherry illustration on top, and a small flower icon.
